parent_acceptance_contract: child unit/property coverage with deterministic thresholds and invariant identifiers
critical-path deterministic e2e scripts or replay commands
structured logging and metrics coverage for trace, run, scenario, timing, outcome, and diagnostic fields

children.title: Register-based VM with 190+ opcodes
children.acceptance_outcome: 190 opcodes defined; fetch-execute loop, 1-indexed register file, cursor array, opcode dispatch, vdbe_exec tracing, per-opcode and slow-query logging, and VDBE execution counters are present.

children.title: Morsel-driven parallel execution engine
children.acceptance_outcome: Deterministic morsel dispatcher e2e verifier passed with replayable artifact evidence and 4-worker speedup above the configured threshold.

children.title: Cranelift JIT compilation for hot queries
children.acceptance_outcome: Hot-query JIT recognizes real constant-result and simple-insert VDBE programs, executes cached compiled templates, preserves interpreter fallback, and passes the deterministic e2e verifier.

children.title: Cursor management, external sorter and aggregate engine
children.acceptance_outcome: External merge sort with spill-to-disk, sort metrics, tracing, and 272 green VDBE tests.

children.title: Vectorized column-at-a-time execution with SIMD
children.acceptance_outcome: Vectorized filter, project, and hash operators with metrics and SIMD detection; 292 green VDBE tests.

children.title: TEST: VDBE opcode coverage, sqllogictest, parallel determinism
children.acceptance_outcome: Opcode coverage, sqllogictest, and deterministic replay coverage exist in the harness with an explicit verification script.

children.title: Planner quick win: unindexed column equality SELECT uses filtered scan
children.acceptance_outcome: Unindexed equality SELECT compiles to a filtered table scan and passed targeted planner check, test, clippy, fmt, and diff checks.

covered_by: bd-1rw.1 vdbe_exec tracing and VDBE execution counters
bd-1rw.2 morsel dispatch run context and replay artifact

safe_runtime_disable_switches: Disable JIT hot path through the fsqlite.jit_enabled or jit threshold controls while keeping interpreter execution active.
Route vectorized or morsel-parallel paths back through interpreter or single-worker execution if a deterministic replay artifact fails.
Keep BEGIN promotion to concurrent mode unchanged; do not change Connection concurrent_mode_default or e2e harness concurrent_mode defaults during VDBE fallback.
rollback_order: Leave register VM, cursor, sorter, aggregate, planner, and concurrent-writer defaults intact.
